title: More Stuff Logo Pack
description: a resource pack for my mod more stuff! all it adds is the logo for the mod.
body:
ONLY FOR MY MOD
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This Resource pack is made for my mod called More Stuff! it's one of my first mods that i am kind of proud of for being one of my first
(it is developed with mcreator)

THE DEPENDENCIES
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In all technicality, this doesn't need any  dependencies, but this is meant to go with my mod called More stuff. 

ENJOY
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Not only do you get to enjoy this new logo, but since it goes with my mod, you will get to enjoy my beutiful mod too!
(:

![the resource pack icon (:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c98da4945f2cc0919208d8645125d1226dc5fcb6_0.webp)
